flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Merced rose 38% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.7k → $9.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Merced rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.4k → $49.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of California-Merced rose 164% between 2006 and 2009 (1.2k → 3.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Merced fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
